name: @aily-project/lib-m5stack-ir
author: M5Stack / Arduino-IRremote / ailyProject
description: M5Stack 板载红外发射积木，内置 Arduino-IRremote 源码，并依据所选开发板自动固化官方红外引脚，支持常见协议与原始波形。
description_en: Self-contained onboard infrared transmitter blocks bundling Arduino-IRremote, with official fixed pins selected automatically for each supported board.
